## quantiles* variants {#variants}

Every [`quantile*`](./quantile.md) function has a `quantiles*` equivalent that computes multiple quantiles in a single pass: it accepts several levels instead of one and returns an [`Array`](/sql-reference/data-types/array) of results in the same order. The calculation method matches the single-value function, so refer to its page for the algorithm, parameters, and trade-offs.
